comment: Cross-agent external skill sources. Independent of the Claude marketplace (.claude-plugin/marketplace.json). skills-sync.sh reads this to install these third-party skill repos into whichever non-Claude agents it detects (Gemini/Codex/OpenCode/Cline), using each agent's native mechanism where the repo ships an adapter, else dropping the plain SKILL.md dirs into that agent's skills path. Add an entry: name (install id), url (git), ref (branch/tag/sha).
